text_blocks.text: upgraded version of the Saturn 1. The
S-IB first stage increased the thrust to
the second stage replaced the S-N with
the S-NB-200, powered by a single
J-2 engine burning liquid hydrogen fuel
kN) of thrust. A restartable version of
the S-NB was used as the third stage
of the Saturn V. The Saturn IB could
into low Earth orbit, sufficient for a
partially fueled CSM or the LM. Saturn
IB launch vehicles and flights were
member of the Saturn rocket family.
